Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 0 -1 -1 0 0}Once I'm done with this sandwich, I have so many other restaurants to visit...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}This must be the "Gourmet King"[n]Tomochika mentioned...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}He certainly seems to know his[n]way around the restaurants here.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Maybe I don't have as much[n]{f 4 30 1 1 1 0} as his sandwich...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I probably need to be at least[n]{f 4 31 1 2 1 0} to get his attention.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 3 -1 -1 0 0}Wh-What? Don't look at me while I'm eating.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 3 -1 -1 0 0}You're making me feel self-conscious![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 3 -1 -1 0 0}I can't savor the flavor of my gourmet sandwich, only available for a limited time, with you here.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It looks like I have enough[n]{f 4 30 1 1 1 0} to catch his attention.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 12607 0 0}Oh, you're curious? Do you fancy yourself a gourmet?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 2 -1 -1 0 0}Is that even possible? An unrefined guy like you? I think not. You'll have to prove it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 12649 0 0}If you can pass my Gourmet Quiz, then I'll believe you.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 0 -1 -1 0 0}Hmm, what should I ask...? I don't want to make it too difficult.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 0 -1 -1 0 0}Give me some time to think... Nom nom...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 0 -1 -1 0 0}Now, the quiz begins. This first question is a freebie.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 12640 0 0}What's the most popular drink at the café over there?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 0 -1 -1 0 0}What color skirt does Azuki Arai's mascot, Azuki-chan, wear?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 12649 0 0}Question three: What item is on the secret menu at Hagakure?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_024_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 12640 0 0}You seem to have some knowledge about food. But it pales in comparison to mine![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 0 -1 -1 0 0}Why don't you bring me something I've never eaten before? It'd have to be quite the odd morsel to fit that bill though.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 0 -1 -1 0 0}If you succeed, then I'll accept you as a fellow gourmet.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_025_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 12675 0 0}Hm!? Wh-What is that mysterious food!?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_027_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 1 -1 -1 0 0}But I'm impressed. I haven't tasted something like that in all my life...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_028_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 0 -1 -1 0 0}Would you care to join me for some food? I do owe you for the food you brought me.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_029_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It seems like he's taken an interest in me...[n]Should I hang out with him for the day?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_032_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 12656 0 0}Have you found something I've never eaten before? My stomach is growling.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 0 -1 -1 0 0}And just so you know, buying something from one of the places around here isn't gonna cut it.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 0 -1 -1 0 0}It has to be something otherworldly by my gourmet standards... assuming such a thing even exists in this world.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_033_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}What type of food has he[n]never eaten before...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_034_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 0 -1 -1 0 0}I don't feel like giving you a quiz anymore. Come back some other time.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_035_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 0 -1 -1 0 0}You're so persistent. Are you here to challenge the Gourmet King again?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_039_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 1 -1 -1 0 0}Perfect timing. Do you want to go get something to eat? I can hear my poor stomach crying sadly.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_040_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 0 -1 -1 0 0}...Wondering about my clothes?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 0 -1 -1 0 0}Well, you see, the reason I wear our school uniform is...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 12689 0 0}It's hard to find something that'll fit![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 1 -1 -1 0 0}Anyway, want to go for a bite somewhere? My poor stomach has been crying for a while.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_041_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Should I spend some time[n]after school with Suemitsu?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_042_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Should I spend the day with Suemitsu?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_044_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 0 -1 -1 0 0}Let us set forth on our culinary adventure! I know just the place.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_045_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 12641 0 0}Awww, but I would've taken you on a culinary adventure![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_046_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 1 -1 -1 0 0}Perfect timing. Do you want to go get something to eat? I can hear my poor stomach crying sadly.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_047_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 0 -1 -1 0 0}...Wondering about my clothes?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 0 -1 -1 0 0}Well, you see, the reason I wear our school uniform is...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 12689 0 0}It's hard to find something that'll fit![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 1 -1 -1 0 0}So, want to go get something to eat? I can hear my poor stomach crying sadly.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_048_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 12697 0 0}Nom nom... Phew! Exams are finally over. Now to celebrate with some food![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 1 -1 -1 0 0}Every hour spent testing felt like torture! I need some brain food! Nom nom...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_049_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 12640 0 0}Were you also in pain during exam week, {f 4 1}-kun? A gourmand's gotta eat, after all.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_050_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 1 -1 -1 0 0}Perfect timing. Do you want to go get something to eat? I can hear my poor stomach crying sadly.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_050_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 12667 0 0}Wonderful, my gourmet friend. Let us set forth on our culinary adventure![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 1 -1 -1 0 0}Today, we'll have some delightfully juicy meat at the strip mall that's practically exploding with flavor... And that can only mean one place.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_051_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 1 -1 -1 0 0}Perfect timing. Do you want to go get something to eat? I can hear my poor stomach crying in anguish.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_051_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 1 -1 -1 0 0}Perfect timing. Do you want to go get something to eat? I can hear my poor stomach crying with anguish.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_052_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 12667 0 0}Wonderful, my gourmet friend! Let's see... Last time, we ascended to a juicy paradise, yes?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 1 -1 -1 0 0}I know just where to go next.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_053_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 1 -1 -1 0 0}Perfect timing. Do you want to go get something to eat? I can hear my poor stomach crying miserably.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_053_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 1 -1 -1 0 0}Perfect timing. Do you want to go get something to eat? I can hear my poor stomach crying miserably.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_054_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 12667 0 0}Wonderful, my gourmet friend! Our culinary adventure continues![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 1 -1 -1 0 0}Today, we'll be going to Wakatsu. There's something for everyone on that menu.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_055_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 1 -1 -1 0 0}Perfect timing. Do you want to get something to eat? I can hear my poor stomach screaming for attention.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_055_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 1 -1 -1 0 0}Perfect timing. Do you want to get something to eat? I can hear my poor stomach screaming for attention.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_056_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 1 -1 -1 0 0}What are you in the mood for today? Rice? Sandwiches? Or maybe noodles? I know just the place![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_057_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 12609 0 0}*munch* *munch* *burp* Ahhh, you're finally here, {f 4 2}-kun![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 3 -1 -1 0 0}D-Do you want to go get something to eat? I can hear my poor stomach crying woefully.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_057_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 3 -1 -1 0 0}D-Do you want to go get something to eat? I can hear my poor stomach crying woefully.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_058_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 12667 0 0}Wonderful, my gourmet friend. I knew I could count on you, {f 4 2}-kun.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 1 -1 -1 0 0}And today's main course... is seafood soup! And I know just the place for it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_059_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 1 -1 -1 0 0}Wanna grab a bite somewhere? I can hear my stomach crying out with a vengeance.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_059_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 1 -1 -1 0 0}Wanna grab a bite somewhere? I can hear my stomach crying out with a vengeance.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_060_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 0 -1 -1 0 0}To be honest... I needed to talk to you today.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 1 -1 -1 0 0}So we need a spot where we can eat good meat and chat. And I know just the place![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_061_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 3 -1 -1 0 0}Could you hear me out? My stomach is crying in sorrow, but that's not important right now...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_061_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 3 -1 -1 0 0}Could you hear me out? My stomach is crying in sorrow, but that's not important right now...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_062_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 3 -1 -1 0 0}Er, no. I'm not here to eat today. I'm here because I wanted to talk to you...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_063_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 1 -1 -1 0 0}I've been waiting for you. I can hear my stomach wailing in agony.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_063_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 1 -1 -1 0 0}I've been waiting for you. I can hear my stomach wailing in agony.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_064_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 1 -1 -1 0 0}First, I have some excellent news to share! Then, afterwards, hm... Oh, I know just the place![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_067_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I don't think there's anything I can do...[n]Maybe I'll try talking to him another day.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_172_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 12671 0 0}Awww, but we could've gone on a culinary adventure together![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_173_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 12671 0 0}Awww, but we could've gone on a culinary adventure together![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_174_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 12671 0 0}Awww, but we were supposed to go on a culinary adventure![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_175_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 12670 0 0}Whuh!? Then how are we supposed to go on a culinary adventure!?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_176_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 12671 0 0}Awww... I wanted to go on a culinary adventure with you though.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_177_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 12671 0 0}Oh... Guess our culinary adventure will have to wait, then.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_178_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 12687 0 0}Whuh...!? Are you saying, if the food isn't delicious, you won't partake on a culinary adventure!?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_179_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 12675 0 0}What!? But I was all ready to take you on a culinary adventure![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_GENERAL_EVENTPLAY
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Message issued by the script. [n]{f 1 5 0}Comm Event Replay.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_GENERAL_PERSPNA
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Я відчуваю, що наші стосунки можуть стати міцнішими завдяки[n]Персоні {f 2 4 2}, {f 0 1 35}{f 2 4 5}{f 0 1 27}...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_GENERALSELECTMSG_MAX
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Я відчуваю нерозривний зв'язок[n]з {f 2 4 0}...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_GENERALMSG_BS_MAX
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Я відчуваю нерозривний зв'язок[n]з літнім подружжям...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_GENERALSELECTMSG_RAN
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Я відчуваю, що незабаром можу стати[n]ближче до {f 2 4 0}...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_GENERALMSG_BS_RANKUP
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Я відчуваю, що незабаром можу стати ближчим[n]до літнього подружжя...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_GENERALSELECTMSG_NOR
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Не думаю, що наш зв'язок[n]стане міцнішим, навіть якщо я проведу[n]більше часу з {f 2 4 0}...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_GENERALMSG_BS_NORMAL
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Не думаю, що наш зв'язок[n]стане міцнішим, навіть якщо я проведу[n]більше часу з ними...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_GENERALSELECTMSG_MAX
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Я відчуваю нерозривний зв'язок[n]з {f 2 4 0}...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Чи варто мені все ще проводити з ними час?..[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_GENERAL_MSG_SOLO_AS
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Чи варто мені проводити час після[n]школи з {f 2 4 0}?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_GENERAL_MSG_SOLO_DT
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Чи варто мені провести[n]день з {f 2 4 0}?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND__GENERAL_MSG_NET
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Чи варто проводити час граючи в [n]ММОРПГ з {f 2 4 0}...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_GENERAL_MSG_SOLO_NT
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Чи варто мені провести вечір[n]з {f 2 4 0}?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_GENERAL_MSG_MULTIPLE
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Чи варто мені провести час[n]після школи з {f 2 4 1}?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_GENERAL_MSG_FASHION_
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Чи варто мені провести час[n]після школи в гуртку моди?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_GENERAL_MSG_BOOKSTOR
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Чи варто мені провести день[n]в книжковому магазині?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_GENERAL_MSG_BOOKSTOR
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Чи варто мені провести день[n]в книжковому магазині?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_GENERAL_MSG_MULTIPLE
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Чи варто мені провести час[n]після школи з {f 2 4 1}?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_GENERAL_EXAMREWARD_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}Я бачила твої результати іспиту. Гарна робота.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4108 0 0}Це нагорода за ефективне поєднання шкільної роботи та нашої... гм, "позакласної діяльності".[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_GENERAL_EXAMREWARD_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}DEV: UNUSED LABEL[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_GENERAL_EXAMREWARD_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}DEV: UNUSED LABEL[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_GENERAL_EXAMREWARD_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}Я бачила твої результати іспиту. Гарна робота.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4108 0 0}Це нагорода за ефективне поєднання шкільної роботи та нашої... гм, "позакласної діяльності".[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_GENERAL_EXAMREWARD_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}Я бачила твої результати іспитів. Гарна робота.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4131 0 0}Це нагорода за ефективне поєднання шкільної роботи та нашої... гм, "позакласної діяльності".[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_GENERAL_EXAMREWARD_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}DEV: UNUSED LABEL[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_GENERAL_EXAMREWARD_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}Я бачила твої результати іспиту. Гарна робота.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4108 0 0}Це нагорода за ефективне поєднання шкільної роботи та нашої... гм, "позакласної діяльності".[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_GENERAL_EXAMREWARD_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}DEV: UNUSED LABEL[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_GENERAL_EXAMREWARD_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}Я бачила твої результати на іспиті. Хороша робота.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}Захоплює, як ти продовжуєш досягати успіхів у навчанні, водночас ведучи важкі сутички.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}Це нагорода за ефективне поєднання шкільної роботи та нашої... гм, "позакласної діяльності".[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_GENERAL_EXAMREWARD_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}DEV: UNUSED LABEL[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_GENERAL_EXAMREWARD_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 6 -1 0 0}Я бачила твої результати іспиту. Гарна робота.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 6 -1 0 0}Це нагорода за ефективне поєднання шкільної роботи та нашої... гм, "позакласної діяльності".[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_GENERAL_EXAMREWARD_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}DEV: UNUSED LABEL[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_GENERAL_EXAMREWARD_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}Я бачила твої результати іспиту. Гарна робота.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4108 0 0}Я принесла тобі подарунок, щоб віддячити за твою наполегливу працю. Ось, візьми.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_GENERAL_EXAMREWARD_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Оскільки я отримав найвищий бал на іспитах, я ще й отримав {f 4 4 1 37 1 3}.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_GENERAL_EXAMREWARD_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}DEV: UNUSED LABEL[n]{f 1 1}
